comment:
Ограничения:
$$
\left\{
\begin{array}{l}
x - 1 > 0 \\
{x}^{2} - 2x + 1 > 0
\end{array}
\right.
\Rightarrow
\left\{
\begin{array}{l}
x - 1 > 0 \\
(x-1)^{2} > 0
\end{array}
\right.
\Rightarrow
x > 1
$$
Теперь решим неравенство:
$$\frac{x^2}{3}\log_7(x-1)\geq \log_7(x-1)^2\\ \log_7(x-1)^\frac{x^2}{3}\geq \log_7(x-1)^2\\ Так~как~7>1\\ (x-1)^\frac{x^2}{3}\geq (x-1)^2$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x-1 >1\\ \ \frac{x^{2}}{3} \geq 2 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x-1< 1\\ \ \ \frac{x^{2}}{3} \leq 2 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\geq 2\\ x^{2} \geq 6 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x\leq 2\\ x^{2} \leq 6 \end{cases} \end{array} \right.$$
$$x\in [-\sqrt{6};2]\cup [\sqrt{6};+\infty)\\ Так~как~x>1\\ x\in (1;2]\cup [\sqrt{6};+\infty)$$
Ответ: \(𝑥\in (1;2] \cup [\sqrt{6} ;+\infty )\).
